offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual reconciliation causes late payment tracking and tenant disputes. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and reconciliation processes.
problem: Time-consuming manual reconciliation of rent payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 property managers with demos
Participate in forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
